title: Renée Zellweger to Star as ‘A Woman in the Sun’ Opposite Sissy Spacek and Mia Threapleton
summary: Black Bear and Artists Equity are teaming up on the project from filmmaker Julia Cox, as Artists Equity CEO Ben Affleck calls it “a moving, gripping exploration of a complex family dynamic with something lurking beneath the surface.”

title: Rocket Lab surges 34% in best day ever on revenue beat, record-setting launch deal
summary: Enthusiasm for space stocks has skyrocketed ahead of SpaceX's anticipated IPO.
